title: FmtStr$ Statement
parameters:
expression	Numeric expression to be formatted.

strFormat	Format specification string.
description: Use FmtStr$ to format a numeric expression into a string.
see_also:
Left$

Right$

Str$

FmtStr$ Example

Function SendDateCode

  String d$, f$

  f$ = FmtStr$(10, "000.00")

  OpenCom #1

  Print #1, f$

  CloseCom #1

Fend
examples:
Function SendDateCode String d$, f$ f$ = FmtStr$(10, "000.00") OpenCom #1 Print #1, f$ CloseCom #1
Fend
